programme.title: Amor perdido
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl named Amalia.(played by actress Amalia Aguilar). with a talent for Rumba, wants to become a glamorous cabaret singer. Her dream is encouraged by her best friend, Ernesto, (Tito Novaro), who also happens to be a gifted composer. While working towards her career goal, Amalia meets the ultimate "bad-boy", a dashing gangster named Luis, (Victor Junco). She is quickly swept off her feet and falls in love with him. Unfortunately, Luis has a jealous streak and a rather possessive personality, especially when it comes to women. He also has a prior girlfriend named Celia, (Yadira Jimenez). Celia also happens to share similar traits with Luis and is filled with jealous rage toward Amelia. So much so that she causes her rival in love to have an accident which leaves Amalia's face horribly scarred-so much so that she must now wear a mask in public. Filled with shame and fear of rejection, she decides to leave Luis without explanation or saying farewell, Her actions anger her former lover, who thinks she left him for better career opportunities. So, he decides to kill poor disfigured Amalia.

programme.title: Verdadera hija
programme.desc: Liliana despierta y quiere casarse con Guzmán. Kendra trata de seducir a Aníbal. Candelaria le dice a Adriana toda la verdad.

programme.title: Sueño por cumplir
programme.desc: Salcero sospecha quienes atacaron a Lili. Espanto no delata a Kendra. Ella tiene planes siniestros. Carlos le reclama a Adriana. Vicente ofrece casarse con Adriana y ser el padre. Adriana le cuenta las buenas noticias a Vicente.

programme.title: Dos padres
programme.desc: Lili es operada nuevamente por hemorragia interna. Carlos quiere estar con Adriana pero ella lo rechaza. Vicente besa a Lili y Arriaga lo ve.

programme.title: Boda gay
programme.desc: Lily mejora y le pide perdón a Arriaga y a Victoria. Stefano y Jean Marie se van a casar y Odette apoya a su hijo. Lily le desea felicidad a Guzmán y Nikki y terminan amigos. Aníbal hace negocios cochinos.

programme.title: Dolor de padre
programme.desc: Día de boda de candelaria y Aníbal. Nelson no invitado llega con un regalo de bodas. Todas las verdades salen. Salcero quiere confesar sus delitos. Arriaga sale de la iglesia y sufre un shock.

programme.title: La advertencia de Salsero
programme.desc: Guzmán y Nikki encuentran a Arriaga. Arriaga no puede ver. Aníbal escapa en un jet. Candelaria se entrega a la ley. Salcero se confiesa con Arriaga. Kendra infecta a Nelson.

programme.title: Gran final: Part 1
programme.desc: Nelson sufre un accidente mortal. Aníbal llega a NY. Kendra va al velorio. Nelson deja sus acciones A Victoria. Nace su hijo y Arriaga recupera la vista. Aníbal en peligro de muerte. Salcero, Guzmán y Arriaga planean atrapar a Kendra.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Gran final: Part 3
programme.desc: Nikki Guzmán Arriaga y Victoria se casan al mismo tiempo. Roy pide la mano de Liliana. Aníbal es dado 82 años de cárcel por sus delitos. Salcero sale libre y se reconcilia con guillo y Beatriz.

programme.title: Amores verdaderos
programme.desc: José Ángel saves Victoria from a kidnapping attempt which puts their lives in danger. Nelson is shocked to meet Kendra.

programme.title: Vanishing on I-95
programme.desc: A woman driving solo to visit a friend on Florida's I-95 mysteriously vanishes. Her divorce leads police one way, but when her body is found it suggests something horribly different. Another woman who reads about the case has a hunch she knows the killer.

programme.title: The Jersey Devil
programme.desc: 16 year-old Brittney Gregory is a star student in Brick Township, New Jersey. When she vanishes one night in 2004, local police begin a search that leads them into a world of dark secrets and dangerous players as they work to solve her disappearance.

programme.title: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: In October of 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: The Sheriff's Son
programme.desc: When an Arkansas outdoorsman disappears, authorities wade through a series of accusations and rumors in their hunt for the missing man. As they zero in on a suspect and the body count rises, detectives rush to capture the killer.

programme.title: Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Twenty eight-year-old army veteran and beloved father of three, Joey Fulgham, is shot dead in his bed in May 2003. With so many suspects Joey's wife, her jealous boyfriend, and even her protective teenage brother police have a lot of ground to cover.

programme.title: Bailar con el demonio
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Living in Sin
programme.desc: Two female nursing assistants in a devout community fall in love. Tragedy strikes when the burden of reconciling sexuality and faith becomes too much.

programme.title: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Good Deed Punished
programme.desc: A Christian couple open up their home to a young woman in need of a helping hand. But their act of charity has unexpected consequences when emotional support gives way to physical attraction and a lustful affair turns deadly.

programme.title: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: La cocina económica
programme.desc: Jorjáis deja su sillón en la entrada del edificio de los vecinos, pero en un momento de descuido, desaparece. Lorena abre una cocina económica.

programme.title: Una pareja real
programme.desc: Los Rivers abren la correspondencia de los López Pérez y se enteran de que les embargarán la lavadora. ¿Magdalena se atreverá a demandarlos?

programme.title: La bocinota
programme.desc: Una refaccionaria se instala en la accesoria del edificio. La inauguración causa molestia entre los vecinos. Rocko y Arturo aprovechan para conseguir chamba en el local.

programme.title: Bienvenido doctor
programme.desc: El doctor Rafael Rivas se muda al edificio y Magdalena no deja pasar la oportunidad para conseguir una consulta gratis abusando de la confianza del nuevo inquilino.

programme.title: Una de terror
programme.desc: Silvita trata de mantener limpios los pasillos del edificio, ya que Lorena y Magdalena sacaron todas sus macetas. Mientras Luis trabaja, Pedro y Cris verán una película.

programme.title: Matrimonio perfecto
programme.desc: Silvita le demostrará a su vieja amiga Caro que tiene un matrimonio perfecto con Luis. Además, Lorena culpa a Germán por no tener limpio el patio del edificio.

programme.title: Roof Garden
programme.desc: Frankie abre un canal de videos para hablar sobre todo lo que sabe de cine. Mientras tanto, Magdalena quiere tener un departamento con un jardín en el techo.

programme.title: Megacorte de agua
programme.desc: La alcaldía anuncia un mega corte de agua y los vecinos acabarán con el suministro del edificio. Los López Pérez instalan un aire acondicionado en su departamento.

programme.title: Bloopers
programme.desc: Un capítulo especial con las equivocaciones de los vecinos más divertidas de la temporada. Descubre quién de los inquilinos comete más errores a la hora de grabar los episodios de la serie.

programme.title: Las palomas
programme.desc: A plague of pigeons arrives at the building and the neighbors fight them off with help from Germán. The López Pérez family runs out of coffee and Arturo must get it from the neighbors.

programme.title: Quédate en casa
programme.desc: The neighbors organize to fight the Coronavirus pandemic. The situation is complicated when someone steals the antibacterial gel from the entrance.

programme.title: El huerto de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa puts a garden in the building, but discovers that someone is stealing her vegetables. Rocko has an intense toothache and doesn't want to go to the dentist.

programme.title: El colchón viejo
programme.desc: Magdalena sells her old mattress to Jorjais, unaware that Arturo keeps his savings there. Cris asks Pedro to formalize their relationship.

programme.title: Los quince años
programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - Forty mile Caribou: Part 1
programme.desc: Steve heads to the interior of Alaska with his friends Doug Duren and Mark Kenyon for an adventure amidst.

programme.title: MeatEater - Forty mile Caribou: Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing their adventure in Alaska's interior, Steve, Doug, and Mark push deeper into the caribou migration. With Doug still hoping to take his first bull, the team sets up on a high ridge, watching caribou stream across the landscape. They face grizzly bears, dense fog, and the ever-changing weather of the Alaskan wilderness. As the days pass, they work together to intercept a herd of caribou, knowing their window could close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild Game Master Class
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella steps out of the field and into the kitchen to showcase some of his favorite.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mountain Lion
programme.desc: Steve heads to the panhandle of Idaho to join wildlife biologist and dedicated houndsman Bart George for a mountain lion hunt. Bruce Dunkin, Bart's mentor and hunting buddy, joins the crew as they attempt to cut a cat's track and let the dogs loose for a hunt in the deep timber of the Idaho mountains.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mud and Trees
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Parker Hall hosts Steve in Missouri for a weekend of chasing giant flathead catfish and gray squirrels along the Missouri River.

programme.title: MeatEater - Blue Mountain Bugles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis head into the wilds of eastern Washington’s Blue Range for an action-packed archery elk hunt. Janis calls multiple bulls into close range, and Steve connects on a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his friends Ryan Callaghan and Steve Kendrot join up for a Chesapeake Bay adventure as they pursue blue crabs and sika deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 2
programme.desc: The adventure in Maryland continues as the guys have a successful sika deer hunt and throw an East Shore crab boil with local oysters and a homemade smoked sika deer ham.

programme.title: MeatEater - Turkey Troubles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis escort first-time hunters Tracy and Maggie on a Montana turkey hunt. Emotions run high as the new hunters deal with failures and successes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Borderland Bucks Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and friends Ryan Callaghan and Mark Kenyon head south of the border in search of Coues deer on an old Mexican ranch that feels lost to time.

programme.title: MeatEater - Borderland Bucks Part 2
programme.desc: An action-filled hunt in Mexico leads to a surplus of venison, so locals teach the guys how to produce wild game tamales from scratch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Walking In The Clouds
programme.desc: Steve and his brother Danny endure miserable weather in the glaciated high country of the Alaska Range as they search for a Dall sheep ram.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: Pod Save the World (Starmer Brexits)
programme.desc:
This week Tommy and Ben catch up on the latest in Iran negotiations, react to Keir Starmer’s resignation, and continue to celebrate World Cup fandom.
First they walk through the text of the US-Iran memorandum of understanding — because now it’s clear why Trump didn't want anyone to see it. The guys break down everything Iran got, including sanctions relief and billions in unfrozen assets, compared to the very vague assurances the US received that Iran won't build a nuclear weapon and will keep the Strait of Hormuz open. Then they go over the latest negotiations in Switzerland, disagreements over what was agreed to, and why the war in Lebanon remains the biggest threat to its success. Across the pond, British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced his resignation after Andy Burnham's decisive by-election win, setting up the UK to have its seventh prime minister in ten years. The guys also dive into Israel's increasingly close and diplomatically fraught relationship with Somaliland, and Colombia's razor-thin runoff election, which was won by a right-wing candidate who calls himself “El Tigre.” And finally, the World Cup remains an absolute joy — Ben and Tommy go over some of their favorite moments like underdog Cape Verde holding Spain and Uruguay to draws, Scottish fans taking over Boston and Miami, and Uzbek fans riding into a Houston stadium on horseback. At the end of the show, Ben speaks to Washington Post columnist Rana Ayyub about the Cockroach Movement in India, and how the war with Iran has spilled over into the country’s politics.

programme.title: What a Day (UK Prime Minister Musical Chairs)
programme.desc:
It’s been 10 years since the UK voted to leave the European Union — a decision with major political implications that most of the country regrets. Since then, neither the Labour Party nor the Conservative Party have been able to keep a leader in power. Prime Minister Keir Starmer resigned his post – becoming the sixth prime minister to quit in the last ten years. For comparison’s sake, the UK had just two prime ministers between 1990 and 2007. So what’s going on in the UK — and who’s up next for prime minister? To find out, we spoke to Nish Kumar, co-host of Crooked Media’s Pod Save the UK.
And in headlines, the US and Iran make conflicting claims over whether or not Iran is welcoming U.N. inspections of its nuclear sites, the Pentagon asks the Senate for roughly $80 billion to help pay for the Iran war, and no one wants to name their babies Donald. I wonder why!

programme.title: Keep It (You’ve Got a Friend in Dorothy)
programme.desc: Louis Virtel is joined by film critic Alonso Duralde to chat queer cinema and Duralde’s book Hollywood Pride: A Celebration OF LGBTQ+ Representation and Perseverance in Film. Then the two get into Toy Story 5 and how the franchise has held up over 30 years. Plus, Australian actor Murray Bartlett swings by to talk about his new movie The Death of Robin Hood.

programme.title: Assembly Required with Stacey Abrams (Obama's Library, Trump's UFC 250, and Two Very Different Americas)
programme.desc: This week, guest host Melissa Murray, host of Crooked Media’s Strict Scrutiny podcast is joined by Erin Ryan, co-host of Crooked Media’s Hysteria. They juxtapose the Obama Presidential Center opening with Trump’s UFC event celebrating his 80th birthday, and talk about the two very different visions of our country that those events (and their attendants) represent. They also touch on Trump’s dismal approval ratings, the biggest takeaways from primary battles in states like New York and Georgia, the positive vibes at the World Cup, and why the right just can’t move on from attacking pride month.

programme.title: The Carpenter's Ball
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Lisa, The Psychologist
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Hawaiian Honeymoon
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The "sweet" surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: The Ex-Secretary
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Oliver Buys A Farm
programme.desc: In this classic series' premiere episode, New York City attorney Oliver Wendell Douglas (Eddie Albert) satisfies his desire for the simple life by buying a farm, much to the chagrin of his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor). John Charles Daly narrates the tale!

programme.title: Lisa's First Day On The Farm
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) brings his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor), to their new home, a ramshackle farm near Hooterville, just outside of Pixley, where she gets to meet the town's oddball residents. Bea Benaderet, Edgar Buchanan and Frank Cady guest star!

programme.title: The Decorator
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) is ready to get farming, but Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts her foot down and says she will leave unless they can hire a decorator to fix the house! Meanwhile, Kate Bradley (Bea Benaderet) teaches Lisa how to make "hotscakes."

programme.title: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Is the Honeymoon period over already? The rumor mill has it that Lisa (Eva Gabor) has packed up and left Oliver (Eddie Albert). Actually, she went back to New York to close up their penthouse apartment. And Mr. Haney is up to his old tricks!

programme.title: My Husband The Rooster Renter
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) calls in a roofer, a plumber and agricultural expert Hank Kimball (Alvy Moore). All of them give the same appraisal of his farm: it's a disaster! Meanwhile, Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) has a few chickens he'd like to rent out!

programme.title: Furniture, Who's Got The Furniture?
programme.desc: The Douglases are awaiting the arrival of their furniture and they don't know it, but Oliver's mother is on her way, too. But when the furniture is accidentally delivered to Mr. Haney's new place, he tries to sell their own possession back to them.

programme.title: Neighborliness
programme.desc: Planting season ends in three weeks and Oliver has yet to get his land plowed. Meanwhile, Uncle Joe (Edgar Buchanan) needs a new shotgun before duck hunting season starts and schemes to solve both of their problems...without Oliver knowing it.

programme.title: Lisa, The Helpmate
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) sends a sample of his soil to the State Scientific College, a report comes back that his farm contains ingredients never before found in soil. Could his soil problems just be cosmetic? Eleanor Audley guest stars.

programme.title: You Can't Plug In A 2 With A 6
programme.desc: Relying on statistics provided by the Department of Agriculture, Oliver (Eddie Albert) decides to plant wheat. But when he goes to Drucker's to buy seed, he learns the other farmers have a unique way to predict the best crop�Mrs. Ziffel's lumbago.

programme.title: Don't Call Us, We'll Call You
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a riff between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Parity Begins At Home
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) plants his entire 160 acres with wheat, only to hear from The Crabwell Corners Conservation and Stabilization Committee, a local farm organization, that he was only permitted to grow eight acres of wheat�because of Mr. Haney.

programme.title: Lisa Has A Calf
programme.desc: The cow that Oliver (Eddie Albert) bought from Mr. Haney is pregnant. Afraid that Haney will claim the new calf, Oliver and Eb decide to keep it secret...only to have the people of Hooterville think that it is Lisa (Eva Gabor) who is expecting!

programme.title: The Wedding Anniversary
programme.desc: It's the Douglases' wedding anniversary and, after initially pretending not to remember, Oliver (Eddie Albert) makes clear that he knows the date very well, he just can't remember exactly how many years he and Lisa (Eva Gabor) have been married.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: Ophelia's Career
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family Goes To School
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Morticia And The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: Fester's Punctured Romance
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: Gomez, The Politician
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Case Against Condoms & Fake Friendship
programme.desc: Why do humans act so complicated? We’re simple creatures, farts are funny, everyone does awkward stuff, yet we all pretend we don’t. Maybe life gets better when you lean into the weird instead of hiding it. So how do you embrace being different and find the fun instead of stressing about it? Expect to learn how Rick’s brain works, what his favourite show and jokes are and how they shaped him, the top things that are difficult to look cool while doing, why using "condoms" with friends are useless, how to handle our people pleasing tendencies for good, why humans are so hard to interact with at times, the awkward feelings of becoming intimate with someone, the biggest message Rick Glassman wants to give out in the world and much more…

programme.title: The Most Important Daily Habits For Health & Longevity
programme.desc: Determining the best actions to take for enhancing our health and extending our lives has grown more challenging. There are an unlimited number of wellness approaches at our disposal, thankfully Dr Patrick has dedicated her professional life to identifying the most evidence-based strategies for improving our health and longevity. Expect to learn if low omega 3s are worse for you than smoking cigarettes, what Rhonda's thoughts are on vaping and nicotine, the best foods to boost your metabolism, the once a week workout that can de-age your heart by 20 years, how to get the benefits of heat exposure if you don't have a sauna, the terrifying health risks of being too sedentary and much more...

programme.title: Why Fear & Horror Feels Kinda Good
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to fear? This fascination often balances us the edge of life and death, infused with a dash of excitement. From his beginnings as a Navy SEAL to becoming a renowned YouTuber, Mr. Ballen possesses a unique storytelling talent. He captivates us with some of the most spine-chilling true stories, drawn both from his experiences and the lives of others. Expect to learn why so many people are obsessed with True Crime and scary stories, the 3 terrifying but true stories MrBallen has prepared in this episode today, what being a NAVY Seal taught MrBallen about life & the backlash he has gotten from the NAVY Seal community by sharing his story, what it means to live a good life, if there is life after death, how to reinvent your entire life, what it takes to tell a good story and much more...

programme.title: Amor perdido
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl named Amalia.(played by actress Amalia Aguilar). with a talent for Rumba, wants to become a glamorous cabaret singer. Her dream is encouraged by her best friend, Ernesto, (Tito Novaro), who also happens to be a gifted composer. While working towards her career goal, Amalia meets the ultimate "bad-boy", a dashing gangster named Luis, (Victor Junco). She is quickly swept off her feet and falls in love with him. Unfortunately, Luis has a jealous streak and a rather possessive personality, especially when it comes to women. He also has a prior girlfriend named Celia, (Yadira Jimenez). Celia also happens to share similar traits with Luis and is filled with jealous rage toward Amelia. So much so that she causes her rival in love to have an accident which leaves Amalia's face horribly scarred-so much so that she must now wear a mask in public. Filled with shame and fear of rejection, she decides to leave Luis without explanation or saying farewell, Her actions anger her former lover, who thinks she left him for better career opportunities. So, he decides to kill poor disfigured Amalia.
